releaseNotes: 🎨 Modern Update UI - No more ugly modals! Status shows directly on button
🔧 Enhanced Network Error Handling - Better sync reliability with retry options
⚡ Performance Improvements - 66% faster game start with optimized database operations
🔒 Improved Security - Better connection timeout handling and error messages
🎯 User Experience - Professional button-based update system like Discord/VS Code
updateInstructions: Download and run the installer. Your data will be preserved during the update.
